intended_use: TraumaCad Neo is indicated for assisting healthcare professionals to analyze orthopedic conditions and to plan orthopedic procedures by overlaying on relevant radiological images visual information su
intended_use_full: TraumaCad Neo is indicated for assisting healthcare professionals to analyze orthopedic conditions and to plan orthopedic procedures by overlaying on relevant radiological images visual information such as measurements and prosthesis templates. Clinical judgment and experience are required to properly use the software. The software is not intended for primary radiological image interpretation or radiological appraisal. Device is not intended for use on mobile phones.
target_condition: Orthopedic conditions requiring surgical planning and post-operative assessment, specifically total hip arthroplasty
ground_truth: Ground-truth annotations done by qualified and trained personnel
other_metrics: Implant detection accuracy: 99%; Landmark detection accuracy within 4mm: 92%
